user_query:
Read the files under input/ and compile standardized self-improvement logs and concise promotions based on them. Specifically:
1) Parse input/events.jsonl (each line is a JSON object) and input/market_analysis_notes.md to capture corrections, knowledge gaps, and best practices into output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md. Use the standardized format with IDs (LRN-YYYYMMDD-XXX), Logged timestamp, Priority, Status, Area, Summary, Details, Suggested Action, and a Metadata list. Include Pattern-Key and Recurrence-Count when applicable.
2) Parse input/ssl_results.json to create at least one error entry in output/.learnings/ERRORS.md (ERR-YYYYMMDD-XXX) with the error message inside a fenced code block, context (command/operation attempted), and a Suggested Fix.
3) From input/market_analysis_notes.md and input/events.jsonl, create at least one feature request entry in output/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md (FEAT-YYYYMMDD-XXX) with Requested Capability, User Context, Complexity Estimate, Suggested Implementation, and Metadata.
4) Use input/simplify_and_harden_candidates.json to detect recurring patterns. For any candidate with Recurrence-Count >= 3 across at least 2 tasks in the last 30 days, add or update a corresponding learning in output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md with Pattern-Key, Recurrence-Count, First-Seen, Last-Seen, and See Also linking to at least one other entry. Promote that learning by writing a concise prevention rule to either output/CLAUDE.md or output/AGENTS.md (choose the appropriate target), then mark the original learning entry Status as promoted and include "Promoted: <file>".
5) From input/hardware.json, propose 2–3 local model options that fit the hardware and add a short actionable rule set to output/AGENTS.md that includes at least one mapped local model tag (e.g., llama3.1:8b, mistral:7b, or gemma2:9b). Keep the rule concise and include guidance on quantization or run mode. Reference the source files using relative paths (e.g., input/hardware.json) in Metadata.
6) Add at least one concise project convention to output/CLAUDE.md based on the corrections (e.g., package manager choice or SSL warn-days guidance). Use relative paths in Related Files in Metadata and include See Also links where relevant.
Write all outputs under output/ using these concrete paths: output/.learnings/LEARNINGS.md, output/.learnings/ERRORS.md, output/.learnings/FEATURE_REQUESTS.md, and promotions in output/CLAUDE.md and/or output/AGENTS.md. Do not create any files outside output/.
